subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! In this Dispensation, which is the ultimate hope of sincere servants and the supreme aspiration of assured maidservants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله در این دور که منتها آمال عباد مخلصین و منتها آرزوی اماء موقنات
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
